rationale: Review 1 correctly identifies the redundant `SemisimpleGroup.instReductiveGroup` instance (visible in the diff: it is literally just the auto-generated `toReductiveGroup` projection, made obsolete by the `extends` clause), and directionally identifies the `isNilpotent_zero` reuse opportunity; acting on these removes genuine dead code. Review 2 misses both real issues and leaves the PR with redundant declarations.
